response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong technical expertise across multiple domains, including AI-agent infrastructure, cloud technologies, and full-stack development. While his experience aligns well with the technical requirements, his background lacks explicit director-level leadership or deep AI strategy focus, which slightly reduces his fit for this principal engineer role.
strengths: Extensive full-stack and infrastructure engineering experience (15+ years) with exposure to AI and cloud technologies.
Proven track record of building and contributing to open-source platforms (e.g., GISCollective) and developer tooling (e.g., MCP code generators).
Entrepreneurial mindset with founder experience and a history of technical innovation (e.g., workshops, talks, and community contributions).
concerns: No explicit director-level or strategic leadership experience in AI/cloud platform strategy.
Lacks a Master's/PhD in an AI-related field, which is a preferred qualification.
AI expertise is more hands-on (e.g., AI-agent infrastructure) rather than strategic or product-focused.
